SessionStart.command: echo '=== MyHeritage Agent Session ===' && echo "Guardrails: $(grep -c '## Guardrail:' .loops/guardrails.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) active" && echo "Log entries: $(grep -c '^## \[' wiki/log.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) total" && git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo '(no git history yet)'

Stop.command: if [ -n "$(git status --short 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '⚠️  Uncommitted changes detected — run /ship before closing.'; fi
